name: Classic Twin-Bell Quartz Alarm Clock
description: A retro-inspired desk alarm clock featuring loud mechanical twin bells, a sturdy metallic handle, and a highly precise quartz analog movement. Available in vibrantly colored matte frames.
warning: Handle the hammer assembly with care when cleaning to avoid bending the ringer mechanism.

name: G-Shock Sports Chronograph Wristwatch
description: An ultra-rugged, tactical multi-function sports watch built with shock resistance, a triple sensor mockup profile, dual time display tracking, and heavy-duty resin strap architecture.
warning: Avoid pressing buttons underwater or during heavy rainstorms to preserve seal life.

name: Amaya Watch Lite Rectangular Smart Watch
description: The Amaya ASW-04 is a sleek, rectangular lifestyle smart watch featuring a brilliant color touchscreen, IP67 waterproof certification, and an efficient battery managing up to 14 days of life.
warning: Do not submerge the watch in hot water, saunas, or deep diving environments.

name: Amaya Watch Lite Circular Smart Watch
description: The Amaya ASW-05 combines traditional round watch ergonomics with modern smart capabilities. Features a crisp round interface dashboard tracking multi-sport activities, daily vitals, and a 14-day standby engine.
warning: Charge only using the designated original charging dock to guarantee battery cell longevity.

name: Okpu D96 Plus Smart Ecosystem Set
description: An all-in-one electronic lifestyle collection package from Okpu featuring a modern square smart watch with interchangeable straps, bundled alongside true wireless stereo earbuds and a matching portable desktop cooling fan.

specs.components: Smart Watch + Wireless Earbuds + Handheld Fan

warning: Ensure the fan blades are clear of obstruction during high-speed rotation.

name: Okpu D97 Plus 7-in-3 Premium Smart Set
description: The elite multi-utility gadget kit. Features a premium square smart watch with tracking capabilities, integrated high-definition wireless earbuds with an external LED charge dock, and an attaching clip-on selfie fill light ring.
features: Wireless Earbuds with Digital LED Cradle

specs.components: Smart Watch + Wireless Buds + LED Fill Light

warning: Charge individual kit components properly to prevent over-voltage degradation.
